questions.q: According to reports, Prime Minister Mark Carney's Liberals are in a position to win a majority government in byelections held on April 13, 2026?
options: Yes, byelection results on April 13, 2026, indicated the Liberals could secure a majority government.
No, the Liberals lost the byelections held on April 13, 2026.
The byelections were postponed due to unforeseen circumstances.
The results of the April 13, 2026, byelections have not yet been released.
questions.correctText: Yes, byelection results on April 13, 2026, indicated the Liberals could secure a majority government.

questions.q: According to a recent study, exposure to trace levels of PFAS through drinking water can diminish the mitochondrial function in mouse embryos across how many generations?
questions.correctText: Exposure to PFAS at trace levels via drinking water has been found to diminish the function of mitochondria in mouse embryos across three generations.

questions.q: What significant compensation package did Oracle's new CFO, Hilary Maxson, receive amidst recent layoffs?
questions.correctText: Oracle's new CFO, Hilary Maxson, received equity awards valued at $26 million, consisting of time-based and performance-based components, as part of her compensation package. This occurred shortly after Oracle laid off approximately 30,000 employees.

questions.q: A Microsoft executive suggested that AI agents will need to acquire what for the software they use, similar to human employees?
questions.correctText: Microsoft executive Rajesh Jha proposed that autonomous AI agents may need to acquire software licenses, effectively functioning as individual users or 'seats' within software systems, similar to human employees.

questions.q: In a series of experiments, researchers found that people consistently underestimated how interesting and enjoyable conversations about what type of topics would be?
questions.correctText: Nine experiments involving 1,800 participants revealed that individuals tend to underestimate the enjoyment and interest derived from conversations about mundane or 'boring' topics.

questions.q: Has Prime Minister Mark Carney scheduled a meeting with Finnish President Alexander Stubb in Ottawa during the week of April 13, 2026?
options: Yes, Prime Minister Carney is set to meet with Finnish President Alexander Stubb in Ottawa this week.
No, the meeting between Prime Minister Carney and President Stubb has been canceled.
President Stubb will be meeting with the Canadian opposition leader, not the Prime Minister.
The meeting is scheduled to take place in Helsinki, not Ottawa.
questions.correctText: Yes, Prime Minister Carney is set to meet with Finnish President Alexander Stubb in Ottawa this week.

questions.q: What is the duration of Iran's nationwide internet blackout as of April 12, 2026, making it the second-longest on record?
questions.correctText: As of April 12, 2026, Iran's nationwide internet blackout has surpassed 1,000 hours, becoming the second-longest on record.

questions.q: Which two entities are reportedly nearing a critical minerals deal to counter Chinese control, as reported by Bloomberg on April 10, 2026?
questions.correctText: The European Union and the United States are reportedly close to finalizing a critical minerals deal aimed at combating Chinese control over these resources.

questions.q: New research indicates that low doses of LSD can alter emotional brain responses in individuals with what condition?
questions.correctText: A study has reported that low doses of LSD can alter emotional brain responses in individuals experiencing mild depression, pointing to specific shifts in electrical brain activity after administration.

questions.q: What significant discount is Polestar offering to Tesla owners on its 2025 Polestar 3 models through April 2026?
questions.correctText: Polestar is offering incentives of up to $21,000 on its 2025 Polestar 3 electric SUVs to current Tesla owners, with the offers valid through the end of April 2026.
